features.featureTitle: Create a `RecentlyPlayed` component at `frontend/src/components/RecentlyPlayed.tsx` that embeds the Live365 recently played iframe (`<iframe width="450" height="511" frameborder="0" src="https://live365.com/embeds/v1/played/a57949?s=md&m=dark"></iframe>`). Wrap the iframe in a responsive container that caps its max-width and centers it horizontally so it displays correctly on both mobile and desktop. Style the surrounding section using the existing country theme (warm earthy tones, serif headings, woodgrain/rustic accent styling consistent with the rest of the site).
Embed the `RecentlyPlayed` component on the public Home page (`frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx`), placed after the 'Ways to Listen' section at the bottom of the page.
